hotel_name: Khách sạn Net Viet Vincom Sóc Trăng (Net Viet Hotel Vincom Soc Trang)

reviews.title: It's also okay, but the toilet drain smells.
reviews.text: Everything is quite good, but at check-in, the room didn't seem to be properly prepared even though we checked in after 2 PM. The toilet spray was okay, but afterwards the drain smelled very bad. The staff assisted, but it still stank. Other than that, everything was very good.
reviews.response: Cảm ơn anh/chị đã chia sẻ trải nghiệm lưu trú. Chúng tôi ghi nhận những góp ý của anh/chị và sẽ xem xét cải thiện trong thời gian tới nhằm mang đến dịch vụ tốt hơn. Hy vọng sẽ có cơ hội phục vụ anh/chị tốt hơn trong lần sau.
reviews.room_type: Superior Queen Room with Two Queen Beds

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: The staff works at nightshift very friendly
reviews.negatives: The last day I stayed there had been an electric interruption cause of no lift for residents.

reviews.title: Friendly staff
reviews.text:
The hotel is new and clean, and the staff are very friendly – it really feels like home. Special thanks to ***, who took great care of us and made us feel welcomed.

I initially booked just 1 night on Agoda to try it out and planned to extend for another 3 nights if everything was good. After checking in, I requested a comfortable room, and I was happy with the first night’s stay.

However, I was a bit disappointed when the staff informed me that if I wanted to continue my stay, I would need to move to another room with double beds and pay extra, as the queen-sized bed was fully booked. It made me feel uncomfortable, especially since I had already planned to stay longer. I understand the situation was due to my 1-night booking on ***, but it would have been better if there was a way to continue in the same room for the rest of my stay.

Overall, the experience was still good, thanks to the warm service, especially from **.
reviews.response: Chúng tôi xin chân thành cảm ơn anh/chị vì những phản hồi tích cực. Sự hài lòng của anh/chị là động lực để đội ngũ chúng tôi không ngừng nâng cao chất lượng dịch vụ. Rất mong sớm được chào đón anh/chị quay lại!

reviews.title: Worth the value, staffs are nice but need to be more informative about pricing and such.
reviews.positives: Clean property, friendly staff
reviews.negatives: We didn’t get information about check out time, we saw checkout time on our reservation from 6am to 12am on the app. Therefore we checked out in the afternoon and we were charged late checkout fee. It wasn’t much but we wished we were informed about it.

reviews.title: Nice
reviews.text: Everything was good, except that the toilet in Room 105 had an unpleasant smell.

reviews.title: Great stay as it’s an easy location to get to. Hotel is clean but smoking is an issue. Make sure to call and ask what ti
reviews.positives: Location is key and the location is right next to the big mall vincom in the small city, The cleaning ladies were very nice and always made our rooms fresh! We tipped both ladies and they always were happy. Rooms decent but the closet and light switch was in an awkward position where if you have the power on and open the closet it accidentally taps and turns off the lights. Kind of annoying when trying to get clothing. The security is really nice and watches your mopeds and the doors. Tip him he does so much and always smiles!
reviews.negatives:
Vietnam isn’t a family friendly environment, there’s always smoking in the area and the men don’t stop smoking (chain smokers). They smoke in the umbrella chairs and drink throughout the night and smoke. I have a one year old and would not recommend the balcony rooms because when people smoke it blows right over into the room. You have heaps and heaps of cigarette smoke in your room. My family doesn’t smoke. I literally was going to check out of the room and move hotels but since we had friends and other family along with us I couldn’t move. the last few nights but my husband said moving to another hotel would be more work with a toddler. If they could have a sign to please step away from the entrance it would make the stay 10x better. 

Also if you lose your single room card it’s a 50k (vnd)charge just an fyi they only give you 1.

Also on booking.com check in says 12 noon and when we went to the location at 11:30am they said that check in was 4pm and there would be an additional 100k for checking in early. We ended up checking early for both rooms and paid an extra 200k. Almost the price of another night because of the confusion. 

Even the email advised us that we were expected at around that time. If the time was to be changed there should be an update on the site and the information we were given and not charged extra. We ended up paying extra but it is an inconvenience.

reviews.title: Affordable price, small room but clean.
reviews.text: No cockroaches and no foul smell in the toilet is a big plus.

reviews.title: Functional, great location.
reviews.positives: Location central. Functional and clean rooms

reviews.title: Great location in city centre
reviews.text: Very friendly staff and receptionist. Great location in city centre, next to Vincom centre, ideal for quality food, coffee, some shopping and cinema.

reviews.title: Good location and value for the money.
reviews.positives: The room was very clean and the staff was exceptionally friendly and accommodating.  500m from the bus station.
reviews.negatives: We had to move on the second day due to a sewer smell coming from our bathroom. They were very accommodating to get us into a new room. And my husband and I both had trouble staying connected to the WiFi.  Other than that it was a good stay.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Clean room + amenities + convenient transportation. But a bit small.

Dạ Nét Việt Hotel xin cám ơn quý khách đã lựa chọn khách sạn chúng em trong kỳ nghỉ lần này ạ.
Chúc sức khỏe quý khách và hẹn gặp lại lần sau ạ

reviews.positives: The location. You can seat outside and watch people. The front desk staff are very friendly and helpful. There is a coffee shop around the corner which has the variety selection and you can order food from the stall outside as well.

reviews.title: Best Value for Money
reviews.text:
Đây có lẽ là khách sạn đáng tiền nhất mà mình từng ở. Giá cả cực kỳ rẻ nhưng lại nằm ngay vị trí trung tâm. Buổi tối, khu vực này rất nhộn nhịp vì nhiều người dân địa phương đến uống cà phê, ăn kem, bánh… tạo cảm giác sôi động hơn hẳn so với các khu vực khác của Sóc Trăng.

Ngay bên cạnh khách sạn có VinMart nên rất tiện lợi, cần gì cũng có thể đi bộ sang mua. Nhân viên thân thiện và phòng ốc cũng sạch sẽ.

⸻

This is probably the most value-for-money hotel I have ever stayed in. The price is extremely cheap, yet it is located right in the city center. In the evening, the area becomes lively as many locals gather for coffee, ice cream, and desserts, making it much more vibrant compared to other parts of Soc Trang.

There is a VinMart right next to the hotel, so it’s very convenient to buy anything you need. The staff were friendly, and the room was also very clean.
reviews.response: Chúng tôi xin chân thành cảm ơn anh/chị vì những phản hồi tích cực. Sự hài lòng của anh/chị là động lực để đội ngũ chúng tôi không ngừng nâng cao chất lượng dịch vụ. Rất mong sớm được chào đón anh/chị quay lại!

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Location, it is in great location. I stayed for 1 night during my motorbike road trip. Food stores are nearby.

reviews.negatives: Location is not super super central but it's a 20mins walk to the river area.

reviews.title: KS Soc Trang
reviews.text: This place is truly worth it with a convenient location, cleanliness, and friendly staff. Definitely worth returning to in the future.

reviews.title: If you are a foreigner who wants to go to Con Dao, just go to the reception and say you need help
reviews.positives: There was a male receptionist who spoke English and guided us very enthusiastically to buy train tickets to Con Dao. Also booked a cheap taxi for us to go to Tran De pier, very helpful. The room is new and very clean, you should book a room with a balcony for more comfort though
reviews.negatives: No complaints

reviews.title: Perfect
reviews.positives: Friendly staff, best location ❤️
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The room is beautiful, clean, spacious, fully equipped with amenities, and the staff are friendly and enthusiastic, especially since it is very convenient to be near Vincom.

reviews.title: Highly recommended hotel in a very interesting city away from the main tourist trail
reviews.positives:
The female reception staff was one of the nicest and most helpful people I have ever met in a hotel in Vietnam!
Despite not having a common language we communicated excellent and patiently with the help of translation Apps.
On arrival I was upgraded to a room with a balcony which was really nice. The room is not really big but very clean and comfortable. There's a big comfortable bed, good WiFi, clean bathroom with an extremely powerful shower with hot water.
Despite facing the main road it was very quiet at night. The hotel is located in a perfect location, walking distance to the local busstation and the Superdong office for ferries to Con Dao.
Excellent morning market nearby, many restaurants, cafes and food stands in the evening very near to the hotel.
Supermarket nearby.
On my departure did the receptionist organize a seat in shared taxi to Can Tho which was very comfortable with door to door transportation and not more expensive than the Futa bus. She made sure that my driver knew where to drop me off in Can Tho.
reviews.negatives: Absolutely nothing!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Hotel located near a supermarket in the nextdoor Vincom plaza so it's quite easy to find things that I forget to bring from home. A bit far from busy area near river but still be able to find some food shops in walking distance. Hotel staff kind of not so fluent in English but they have very  good service minded and try to communicate and hands on the help.

reviews.title: An amazing 2 days stay at this hotel
reviews.positives: It really an amazing experience during 2 days with my family because I can feel the warm from the staffs and owner her. We stayed in a big room with two double bed, the room was very comfortable and really clean with full amenities. Very thankful to the staff that helped us in our vacation
reviews.negatives: Nothing to dislike

reviews.title: Great location
reviews.text: Amazing location and their facility is like new.

reviews.title: Convenient location. The staff is very cute and enthusiastic! Will definitely come back
reviews.positives: The room is clean, I booked the room with 2 separated-single bed, there is big balcony with beautiful view of city. I really love they design the room, it's cozy and modernly
reviews.negatives: After 22:00 there aren't many restaurant that open

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: It was clean, has a small balcony for small room. I would love to come again

reviews.title: We had a wonderful trip when staying at this lovely hotel
reviews.positives: Comfortable rooms, delicate soft colors, luxurious and attractive minimalist design worthy of 10 points. Enthusiastic and friendly staff. Very satisfied!
reviews.negatives: Nothing to complain

reviews.title: Perfect choice
reviews.text: The hotel is located right in the city center, next to Vincom and beautiful cafes and restaurants. It is about 300 meters from the Soc Trang bus station, making it convenient to move around. The rooms are clean, and all the staff are very friendly. If I have the chance to return, this hotel will be my top priority.

reviews.negatives: Nothing at all

reviews.title: Great staff, clean hotel, perfect location
reviews.text: On arrival I was met by friendly and helpful staff that showed me to my room. The room was clean and location was perfect, as it was next to the mall and many coffee/tea shops.

reviews.negatives: There is no breakfast service here, but around the hotel there are many eateries and convenience stores within walking distance

Propre et personnel sympa
 mais bruyant
reviews.positives: Personnel sympathique et hôtel propre. Les employés nous ont trouvé un bon chauffeur pour visiter la ville dès notre arrivée.
reviews.negatives:
L'hôtel est situé sur une rue très bruyante.  Il y a de la circulation 24 heures sur 24. Il n'y a aucune insonorisation et la porte du balcon ne ferme pas de façon étanche. Pendant notre séjour, il y a aussi eu des travaux de réparation de la chambre du dessous
  de 5h du matin à 22h30 et le propriétaire n'a pas accepté de cesser les travaux vers 21h malgré nos demandes répétées. À éviter, à moins de dormir très profondément!

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Hôtel bien situé au centre ville

reviews.title: 가성비 좋아요
reviews.text: 깨끗하고 위치 좋아요

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives:
Personnel très gentil !
Hôtel et quartier agréable avec plusieurs petits cafés sympas au calme dans l'impasse derrière.
Chambre propre et calme pour celle qui donne sur la petite rue.
Près du centre et à 5min à pieds de la navette Superdong pour départ à Con Dao.

reviews.title: Mình cũng không mấy khi để lại bình luận
reviews.text:
Mình đã trải nghiệm ở đây 
Chủ có sự đầu tư nhưng không tới,phòng bị hỏng máy sấy,bị muỗi ,cống nhà vệ sinh bị mùi điểm trừ cực lớn ko bao giờ muốn quay lại .

reviews.title: Satisfaisant
reviews.positives: Bien situé, le personnel sont efficaces et très agréable.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: Phòng nhỏ. Phù hợp giá tiền. Làm mất đồ khách nhưng xử lí quá kém. Mới nhận phòng còn tóc dưới khe giường nệm. Gần vincom, gần chợ thuận tiện cho việc mua sắm
reviews.response: Cảm ơn anh/chị đã chia sẻ trải nghiệm lưu trú. Chúng tôi ghi nhận những góp ý của anh/chị và sẽ xem xét cải thiện trong thời gian tới nhằm mang đến dịch vụ tốt hơn. Hy vọng sẽ có cơ hội phục vụ anh/chị tốt hơn trong lần sau.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Hôtel très propre et confortable, toujours quelqu'un à l'accueil même si personne ne parle anglais
reviews.negatives: Chambre Deluxe avec balcon donnant sur l'avenue assez bruyante mais personnellement cela ne m'a pas gêné. Bouilloire, réfrigérateur avec eaux, sodas et même noddles en cas de petite faim, un +

reviews.title: Tạm ổn
reviews.text: Chỗ đậu xe ko thuận tiện, chất lượng ở mức tạm ổn
reviews.response: Cảm ơn anh/chị đã chia sẻ trải nghiệm lưu trú. Chúng tôi ghi nhận những góp ý của anh/chị và sẽ xem xét cải thiện trong thời gian tới nhằm mang đến dịch vụ tốt hơn. Hy vọng sẽ có cơ hội phục vụ anh/chị tốt hơn trong lần sau.

reviews.title: Hôtel moderne
reviews.positives:
Hôtel moderne, la chambre familiale est très spacieuse, propre et assez lumineuse. 
Le personnel est très sympathique et serviable.
L'hôtel est bien situé avec plusieurs cafés et restaurants aux alentours.
reviews.negatives: Bruit de perceuse à 7:15 du matin mais qui n'a pas duré trop longtemps

reviews.title: Très courte nuit mais très agréable.
reviews.positives: Personnel très professionnel, propreté irréprochable, très confortable et très belle chambre.
reviews.negatives: Il est difficile de boire un verre ou de manger aux alentours de l' hôtel.

reviews.title: Hotel đẹp
reviews.text: lần sau tôi sẽ chọn phòng có cửa sổ view ngìn ra ngoài sẽ đẹp hơn
reviews.response:
Dạ phòng deluxe ban công view thành phố rất được khách hàng lựa chọn ạ!
Dạ Nét Việt Hotel xin cám ơn quý khách đã lựa chọn khách sạn chúng em trong kỳ nghỉ lần này ạ.
Chúc sức khỏe quý khách và hẹn gặp lại lần sau ạ

reviews.title: Parfait pour une nuit
reviews.positives: Excellent hôtel tout neuf très propre personnel très sympa
reviews.negatives:
Grande rue très bruyante la journée mais plutôt calme la nuit
Malheureusement pas de petit déjeuner

reviews.title: Mọi thứ ok, ngoại trừ.......
reviews.text:
Phòng Suite gì mà ban ngày nóng quá.
KS cần cải thiện, có thể lắp thêm quạt cho du khách dễ chịu hơn.
reviews.response: Cảm ơn anh/chị đã chia sẻ trải nghiệm lưu trú. Chúng tôi ghi nhận những góp ý của anh/chị và sẽ xem xét cải thiện trong thời gian tới nhằm mang đến dịch vụ tốt hơn. Hy vọng sẽ có cơ hội phục vụ anh/chị tốt hơn trong lần sau.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Très bien et confortable.
Localisation parfaite pour la navette SuperDong

reviews.title: Ok
reviews.text: Ok
reviews.response: Chúng tôi xin chân thành cảm ơn anh/chị vì những phản hồi tích cực. Sự hài lòng của anh/chị là động lực để đội ngũ chúng tôi không ngừng nâng cao chất lượng dịch vụ. Rất mong sớm được chào đón anh/chị quay lại!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Excellent rapport qualité prix, chambre très confortable dans le centre de Soc Trang. Le personnel est adorable. Je recommande cet hôtel situé à 5 min du bureau de superdong, très pratique pour se rendre à Con Dao. Je recommande chaudement.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Phòng sạch sẽ anh chị nhân viên nhiệt tình khỏi nói luôn . Trải nghiệm quá ok ạ ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

reviews.title: Auch bei günstigem Preis sollten die Zimmer sauber sein.
reviews.positives: Das Personal war sehr freundlich, hat uns einen günstigen und schnellen Laundry Service angeboten.
reviews.negatives:
Im Zimmer gab es viele Mücken die vom ungepflegten Balkon oder durch den Ablauf der Dusche ins Zimmer kamen.
Vor allem das Bad war nur stellenweise und ungründlich geputzt, einige Flächen auf TV, Fön usw sahen so aus als seien sie schon sehr sehr lange nicht mehr von der Reinigung berührt worden. Insgesamt macht das Zimmer einen ungepflegten Eindruck.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Phòng sạch sẽ xứng với giá tiền, nhân viên thân thiện, rất ok. Recommend.

reviews.title: Bemühtes Personal trotz kaum vorhandenen englisch Kenntnissen.
reviews.positives: Das Personal war bemüht und hat uns beim Organisieren des Transports zur Fähre geholfen. Der Inhaber des Hotels hat uns zwei Getränke von nebenan spendiert, da haben wir uns sehr geschätzt gefühlt. Vielen Dank 🙏🏼 Wir würden vermutlich wiederkommen
reviews.negatives:
Leider sprachen nur 1-2 Personen englisch. Aber mit Google-Übersetzer konnte man kommunizieren. 
Getränke gab es im Zimmer, allerdings wurde beim Auschecken Geld dafür verlangt, das war uns vorher nicht bewusst. Ansonsten war alles super 👍🏼

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Ks vị trí trung tâm,sạch,đẹp,nhân viên dễ thương,vui vẻ,sẽ gt cho bạn bè khi đến Sóc Trăng
reviews.response: Chúng tôi xin chân thành cảm ơn anh/chị vì những phản hồi tích cực. Sự hài lòng của anh/chị là động lực để đội ngũ chúng tôi không ngừng nâng cao chất lượng dịch vụ. Rất mong sớm được chào đón anh/chị quay lại!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Der Besitzer vom Hotel kann sehr gutes Englisch sprechen und ich habe bereits vor unserer Ankunft mit ihm gechattet um die Fährtickets von Tran de zu organisieren. Er war unglaublich hilfsbereit und hat direkt seine Hilfe angeboten. 

Als wir im Hotel angekommen sind war jemand da der leider nur Vietnamesich konnte, aber trotzdem sehr willig war uns weiterzuhelfen mit google übersetzter. Leider ist es mit Übersetzer trotzdem manchmal etwas schwierig. Eine halbe Stunde später kam der Besicher vorbei und konnte uns dann nochmal weiterhelfen.

Unsere Fähre ging um 5 Uhr morgens und der Besitzer hat uns sogar noch seine Nummer gegeben falls wir am Hafen doch noch Hilfe benötigen sollten. Die Hilfsbereitschaft war also unglaublich!

Zimmer sehr sauber und nett!

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
비싸지도 싸지도 않은 가격.
다만 화장실 샤워기가 양변기를 정통으로 물세례.
reviews.negatives: 속짱에 몇일 더 머물렀으면 계속 이용했을텐데.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives:
1. Điều hòa rọi vào gường, khí lạnh làm ngạt mũi, ko tốt cho sức khỏe. Ko ngủ đc.
2. Tiếng ồn máy bơm tăng áp nước chạy suốt đêm.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: Phòng hôi, tv lỗi, phòng rất nhỏ không đúng thực tế

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Giá không giống với niêm yết trên bảng thông báo

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives:
Vị trí mgay trung tâm nên dễ tìm, xung quanh đủ các dịch vụ ăn uống, giải trí, mua sắm...
Phòng có đủ tiện nghi và sạch sẽ.
reviews.negatives:
1. Hạn chế về chỗ đậu xe ô tô.
2. Cách âm kém, nếu khách phòng bên cạnh mà ngủ ngáy thì vẫn nghe. Nếu lỡ giữa đêm mà 2 vợ chồng có xảy ra xung đột, Boxing với nhau trêm giường mà cường độ mạnh thì có khi cả tầng đều nghe.
3. Vòi nước chảy yếu
4. Khách sạn hơi khắt khe về giờ trả phòng, quy định qua 15 phút là tính thêm giờ. Mình trả phòng lúc 12h22 phút. Trung bình mỗi tháng mình ở khách sạn hết 20 ngày, và đi khắp cả nước, trải nghiệm đủ loại hình dịch vụ nghỉ dưỡng. Lần đầu tiên găpj 1 quy định khắc khe như vậy nên cảm thấy chưa hài lòng.
Thêm lúc trả phòng ngay trời mưa để đưa hành lý lên phải lùi xe vào rất khó khăn, nên cũng là 1 hạn chế.

Trên đây là những đóng góp với tinh thần xây dựng, hy vọng khách sạn xem lại và kiểm tra có đúng không.
Cảm ơn!

reviews.title: Thoải mái, cực kì thích
reviews.positives: Chỗ nghỉ sạch sẽ, yên tĩnh, view đẹp rất đáng giá tiền để đi nha mọi người. Nhân viên thì cũng rất nhiệt tình với khách lắm nè, thấy khách lại là sẽ ra đón và xách hành lí lên cho khách, khi trời mưa thì cũng sẽ mang dù ra đón tiếp khách vào chứ không để khách ướt. Nhân viên 10/10.
reviews.negatives: Tuy nhiên thì nhân viên không giỏi tiếng anh, nhưng vẫn sử dụng google dịch cho khách hiểu chứ không làm ngơ. Nói chung không có nhiều điểm gì để chê nha mọi người.

reviews.positives: Sach sẽ

reviews.title: Khách sạn đem đến trải nghiệm cực tốt, dễ chịu
reviews.positives: Vị trí gần trung tâm khu đông đúc, gần nhiều địa điểm ăn uống và vui chơi giải trí. Không gian phòng sạch sẽ, sang trọng đầy đủ tiện nghi. Nhân viên hỗ trợ nhiệt tình, thân thiện, hiếu khách.
reviews.negatives: Hệ thống cách âm kém, ngồi trong phòng có thể nghe ngoài hành lang nói chuyện hoặc nghe thấy tiếng trên lầu hoặc phòng bên cạnh. Do dưới cửa vẫn còn khoảng trống nhỏ nên khói thuốc bên ngoài hành lang vẫn có thể bay vào.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Sạch sẽ

reviews.title: Nice looking establishment and good service, but our room had not been cleaned at all
reviews.positives: The receptionist was very nice and helpful even though she did not speak English! Even ordered a early morning taxi for us for the Phu Quoc express ferry leaving for Con Dao Island. Nice looking room, with fresh linen and towels.
reviews.negatives:
The room had not been cleaned for a long time, it was very messy and dirty. The utensils and coffee cups were also not changed, even had stains still on them. Dead ants below the mattress. Quite noisy corridors.
However, had it only been cleaned we would have been happy with our experience.

reviews.title: Overall is fine but not flexible check-in
reviews.positives: The location is good and the facilities are clean.
reviews.negatives: I booked a standard room on the app. There was no option to pay in advance. However, the room was cancelled due to late check in (around 6pm). Thus, I had to book a deluxe room without any support.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Centrally located hotel
reviews.negatives: The windows were not closing properly so it was really a nightmare/challenge to find some sleep because of the (traffic) noise. The hotel is/was in front of the main street going into the city center and there is traffic 24/7.

reviews.title: Hotel is at good location, staffs are friendly, room is too small
reviews.positives: Property is modern and very clean, but the room was too small,
reviews.negatives: The room I stayed we too small

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Good location
reviews.negatives: At checked out, credit card machine not working for few days, so we have to paid cash.

reviews.title: The staff rectified a fault very efficiently
reviews.positives: Upon checking into our room we discovered that it had not been cleaned properly from the previous guest and we complained to the reception. We were pleased that the receptionist was sufficiently empowered to change our room and an upgrade too without too much fuss.
reviews.negatives: Our original booked room was not properly made up from the previous guest, some things were overlooked like crumpled bedsheet (not changed) and half empty water bottle in the refrigerator

reviews.title: Good stay
reviews.positives: It was close to the busstop and there was a shopping centre around the corner. Good room, with a very nice shower.
reviews.negatives: The room is a little small

reviews.title: Other than terrible beds hotel is ok
reviews.positives: Nice clean hotel reception staff excellent nice room shower great and close for shopping etc
reviews.negatives: The bed would be the worst bed I have ever slept in actually next to no sleep at all might off well slept on the floor a same as everything else good

reviews.title: Very good

reviews.negatives: Small room. Construction noises throughout the day :(

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Room was clean. Location good. Staff helpful.  Worth the money spent.

reviews.title: Nice boutique hotel, conveniently located.
reviews.positives:
This apartment is new, although the rooms are small it is modern and clean. 
There is ample power and lights, nice big windows, friendly reception / security.
Large bathroom, again, all new as at December 2024. 
Good location, SocTrang is reasonably spread out so everything is far however this is located in a nice area and it’s handy as there is a new shopping mall with supermarket 100m away.
reviews.negatives:
The rooms are on the smaller side but the family room we had was a simple efficient layout.
The beds are rock hard, I swear after 3 night I pulled some muscle I never knew I had in my lower back, when I say hard I mean timber planks might have more give 😊 my recommendation is request for an extra duvet and sleep on top of that.

reviews.title: Pleasant stay
reviews.positives: I love the hotel room, location and the house keeping. The staffs were very friendly and helpful.
reviews.negatives: The bed is a bit hard, pillow is too thin.

reviews.title: Great
reviews.positives:
Very friendly staff, including the
Security guard
reviews.negatives: Occasionally had a sewerage smell in the bathroom

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
My family and I visited Soc Trang on two separate occasions, and stayed at Net Viet Hotel on both occasions. 

Firstly, the location is fantastic. Close to the city centre and an easy taxi ride away to the local markets and eateries. A small shopping centre next door with a supermarket, pharmacy, cinema and some restaurants (Korean and Vietnamese hotpot). Busy enough during the day, but quiet enough in the night if you like your peace and quiet. A Gongcha right downstairs and gelato place next door, with plenty of outdoor seating available. 

Staff were extremely friendly and efficient. On some occasions they assisted us with ordering taxis or even food services for delivery. Always ready to greet with a friendly smile.
reviews.negatives:
As we stayed on two separate occasions I’ll provide comments about the different rooms we stayed in and hopefully that helps. The room layout are as follows:
101 and 102 - standard room with queen bed and no window/view (2 people)
103 and 304 - deluxe room with window/view and balcony, with queen bed and double bed (3 people)

Room size. For the standard rooms whilst it did the job I did find it to be a tad small and somewhat claustrophobic without having any windows of sorts. No natural light into the room so you’re relying on the light switch. It’s “cozy” with two people but that’s borderline getting in each others faces. For the deluxe room I found that 103 was a much better room for a number of reasons: bed layout meant room being more spacious, bathroom layout was better (will touch on this further). Whilst 304 was on a higher level with better view I would trade this for the space of 103.

Bathroom. I understand it’s quite common for Vietnamese households to have a small bathroom space that’s a toilet and shower space, but given how new the hotel is I would’ve thought the bathrooms would a bit more spacious. This is applicable to rooms 101 and 102, so could be for the standard rooms. These bathrooms were small and had the shower over the toilet, which I found got quite annoying as once after a shower the toilet seat/general area would be wet. As there’s not a lot of room in the bathroom it’s difficult to get changed in the bathroom. To add to this there are no hooks behind the bathroom door, and the only hook/shelf in the bathroom was right where the shower head is. A bit counter productive. For the deluxe rooms - room 304 had a pungent smell that was difficult to get rid off, which we concluded might’ve been from the drainage. The bathroom in 103 was exceptional, and actually had a glass that separates the shower/shower head from the toilet - so no problem with that being wet after a shower.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Staff went over and above to make us feel welcome and nothing was ever too much trouble, not even durian! It certainly was value for money. We will stay again when next in Soc Trang.

reviews.title: Nice clean Hotel with friendly staff.
reviews.positives: Location was good for a one night stay. Clean modern rooms and pleasant staff.

reviews.title: Great hotel in central location. Helpful staff with spotlessly clean rooms. Very good value.
reviews.positives: Friendly staff and spotless room with comfortable bed and great bathroom.
reviews.negatives: All good

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Very clean modern hotel with friendly staff.

reviews.title: Great place!
reviews.positives: Outstanding place, modern, clean and comfy. Would gladly return!
reviews.negatives: Air con wasn't working.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Nice and clean room , great location

reviews.title: Convenient and comfortable stay
reviews.positives:
Great location in the centre of everything. It's across the road from the Vincom shopping centre and a large supermarket, a 5 minute walk to the bus station if you're arriving or leaving by bus, and an easy Grab or Xhan SM/Green SM taxi ride to pretty much everywhere.

The staff were friendly and kind, and check in was quick and easy.

The room was small but really functional with a cupboard /shelving unit for luggage, a rail to hang clothes, and a mini fridge which I liked as it meant I could easily self cater breakfast and snacks, plus keep water cool.

The bed was firm but comfortable and the room also had a small desk and chair. Wifi was good and there was a lamp next to the bed so you didn't have to get up to turn the lights on and off. It's a small thing but it's a helpful convenience.

Wet bathroom which was well appointed and functional with steady hot water. Some toiletries provided (body wash, shampoo and a spare toothbrush) which was thoughtful.

The building has an elevator which is helpful if you have heavy luggage or any mobility challenges.

Soc Trang in general was a pleasant surprise for me and the hotel was great. I'd gladly stay again.
reviews.negatives: My only negative is that there's no curtain on the window. I was in room 302 and the window faced the stairwell so it was lit 24/7. Having a curtain would help darken the room for sleep. It's not a big deal and I didn't mention it to the staff at the time - I just used my sleep mask. But a curtain would be great.

reviews.title: Good place to stay with a strategic location near bus station
reviews.positives: Clean room, comfy bed, decent size room, clean bathroom, close to the bus station. Good place to stay for a day before going to Con Dao or returning from Con Dao.
reviews.negatives: I thought the 2 cup noodles placed together with 2 water bottles were complimentary. I was wrong, had to pay for the cup noodles. I don't mind paying, it's not much anyway. but either there's no information about the price of the cup noodles, or I just did not find the information.

reviews.negatives:

Otherwise perfect

reviews.negatives: I loved everything
